description_long: This is a black and white Chevrolet Suburban-style police SUV with a robust, boxy build and a high ground clearance. The vehicle features prominent 'SHERIFF' text in bold black letters on both front doors, accompanied by a gold sheriff's star badge insignia. The roof is equipped with a multi-colored emergency light bar, and the front is fitted with a heavy-duty push bumper. The windows are tinted dark, and the wheels are large with metallic rims. The rear of the vehicle displays a license plate and additional police markings, making it easily identifiable as a law enforcement vehicle.
description: A black and white sheriff's SUV with bold police markings, a roof light bar, push bumper, and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the push bumper, windshield, and roof-mounted emergency light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'SHERIFF' text, gold star badge, and four doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the license plate, rear window, and subtle police markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'SHERIFF' text and badge visible.
attribute_police_markings: Large black 'SHERIFF' text on both front doors, gold sheriff's star badge next to the text, and additional subtle police markings on the rear. The markings are bold and easily visible, with the text in uppercase and the badge in gold with a star design.
attribute_emergency_lights: Roof-mounted light bar with red, blue, and white segments, rectangular in shape and spanning the width of the roof. Additional small lights may be present on the front grille.
attribute_police_insignia: Gold sheriff's star badge on both front doors, positioned next to the 'SHERIFF' text.
attribute_license_plate: License plate visible on the rear, white with dark text, mounted centrally below the rear window. No special markings or codes are clearly visible.
